raw_consumer_statement:
Hi, I noticed several unauthorized charges on my Citi credit card ( See below ) on XX/XX/year>. I called and chatted, several times with their reps & were transferred to their Billing, Dispute, and Fraud departments since XX/XX/year>. 

Each time, they kept telling me that my payment is due, then they will ask for the unauthorized charges, the police report number, etc. once I told them about the disputed unauthorized charges. 

I also explained to them each time, that I was not in that area and which company would charge XXXX times ( {$100.00} ) in one day and then the same amount the following day. Then, same with the gas company. They kept telling me that they will investigate ( since XX/XX/year> ) but they keep racking up the late fees and interest charges. 

They did put on my statement that they're all " Disputed '' but it has also affected my credit report due to the past due balance.
